metcon.name: Wood
metcon.description:
5 Rounds For Time
400 meter Run
10 Burpee Box Jumps (24/20 in)
10 Sumo-Deadlift High-Pulls (95/65 lb)
10 Thrusters (95/65 lb)
1 minute Rest

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes lower body and anterior chain; accessory work targets posterior chain for balanced development and injury prevention.

raw_text:
Warm up | 200m jog
10 air squats
10 scap push-ups
10 glute bridges
10 PVC pass-throughs
30 sec PVC Shoulder opener
10 Cossack squats
5 Romanian deadlifts
5 Sumo deadlift high pulls
5 front squats
5 push press
5 thrusters
3 burpee box overs
Partner Wood | Either with a partner or Solo
Share reps as required with a mate
400m run together
20 burpee box jumps
20 sumo deadlift high pulls
20 thrusters
Rest 1 minute after each round
quick transitions - break early to share the reps
Wood | 5 Rounds For Time
400 meter Run
10 Burpee Box Jumps (24/20 in)
10 Sumo-Deadlift High-Pulls (95/65 lb)
10 Thrusters (95/65 lb)
1 minute Rest
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Wood. Rounds for Time: 400 meter Run, 10 Burpee Box Jumps (24/20 in), 10 Sumo-Deadlift High-Pulls (95/65 lb), 10 Thrusters (95/65 lb). For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
